/opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/x86_64-pokysdk-linux/usr/bin/aarch64-poky-linux/aarch64-poky-linux-g++ --sysroot=/opt/nxp-real-time-edge/2.5/sysroots/armv8a-poky-linux -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libencode_msgs.so -o /home/wave/catkin_ws/devel/lib/libencode_msgs.so CMakeFiles/encode_msgs.dir/src/encode_msgs.cpp.o
